description: A tiny chibi basketball shooter pet inspired by Stephen Curry, built for Codex workspace companionship.

patient waiting loop with small motion

pet_notes: Tiny chibi pixel-art-adjacent basketball shooter inspired by Stephen Curry: warm brown skin, short close-cropped dark hair, friendly focused face, compact athletic body, blue and gold basketball outfit with no logos and no readable text, orange basketball prop, confident sharpshooter personality. Keep him clearly a digital pet, not a realistic portrait.
style_notes: Codex digital pet style: compact chibi proportions, thick dark 1-2 px outline, visible stepped pixel edges, limited flat palette, flat cel shading, crisp silhouette, simple expressive face, tiny limbs, no shadows, no scenery, no text, no logos.
house_style: Codex digital pet sprite style: pixel-art-adjacent low-resolution mascot sprite, compact chibi proportions, chunky whole-body silhouette, thick dark 1-2 px outline, visible stepped/pixel edges, limited palette, flat cel shading with at most one small highlight and one shadow step, simple readable face, tiny limbs, and no detail that disappears at 192x208. Avoid polished illustration, painterly rendering, anime key art, 3D render, vector app-icon polish, glossy lighting, soft gradients, realistic fur or material texture, anti-aliased high-detail edges, and complex tiny accessories.
